description:
This was the second and last game in a two game match on 9x9 in 1968, played to try to decide the proper komi for this board size. The other game Miyamoto Naoki (black) won against Go Seigen with four points also.
May be I've missed some variation, please tell me ..#
Thx to Bass, variations fixed

No komi, white has one prisoner, black none.]AP[goproblems]
